title: solanum virgultorum
intro: Solanum virgultorum, also known as tree datura, is a plant species that belongs to the nightshade family and is native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antitussive effects. The health benefits of Solanum virgultorum include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as pain relief and reduced inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used to treat various ailments, although caution should be exercised due to the plant's potential toxicity.
